message:
test(remote): verify Saga drop during stack unwind skips compensation side-effects

New test saga_drop_during_unwind_skips_compensation_side_effects
exercises the Drop guard path added in the prior commit: a Saga
with a registered compensation step is dropped while a panic is
unwinding the stack.  The test verifies that the compensation
callback is NOT invoked during unwind (since running arbitrary
side-effects during panic propagation risks double-panics and
abort), and that the panic propagates cleanly through
catch_unwind.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
